---
title: "verify_loop_logic.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\harness\verify_loop_logic.py"
loc: 55
complexity: 7
logic_score: 6.92
style_score: 3.69
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.26
---

## Intent
The `verify_loop_logic.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_autonomous_loop_logic, side_effect. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_autonomous_loop_logic, side_effect. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.sentinel.muninn](file://src.sentinel.muninn)

### Exports
- `test_autonomous_loop_logic`
- `side_effect`
